title: Singing Elvis dog — power path restored
description: This Elvis Christmas plush would not run reliably on batteries. We replaced corroded contacts and repaired the internal circuit board so the singing mechanism works again.
itemDetails: A singing Elvis Christmas dog is a licensed-style holiday novelty combining pop-culture music branding with animatronic plush formats popular in the 2000s-2010s. Items in this category were often sold as seasonal gag gifts and collector decor pieces. Construction typically uses plush textile shells over a plastic mechanism housing with a battery-powered speaker/motor module.
repairDetails: This singing Elvis Christmas dog had power and playback faults tied to the battery path and board. We replaced the battery contacts and repaired the internal circuit board so the figure sings again.
